manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: QUESTIONER: What is inside?
ANSWER: Foundation is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Blush is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Highlighter is in the northeast.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: The hedgehog is on my right.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is in the southwest? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: Foundation is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Blush is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Highlighter is in the northeast.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: The hedgehog is on my right.
QUESTIONER: What is there?
ANSWER: Cleanser is there.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: Melons are in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?
ANSWER: The eagle is everywhere.
QUESTIONER: What is nowhere?
ANSWER: The shirt is nowhere.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is in the southwest? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: QUESTIONER: What is inside?
ANSWER: Foundation is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Blush is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Highlighter is in the northeast.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: The hedgehog is on my right.
QUESTIONER: What is there?
ANSWER: Cleanser is there.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: Melons are in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?
ANSWER: The eagle is everywhere.
QUESTIONER: What is nowhere?
ANSWER: The shirt is nowhere.
QUESTIONER: What is at the center?
ANSWER: Toner is at the center.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is at the top? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog

BOTTOM: elephant

NORTHWEST: melons

SOUTHWEST: blush

NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation

Let us start.

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?

QUESTIONER: What is in the southeast?

QUESTIONER: What is on your left?

QUESTIONER: What is at the top?
ANSWER: Pens are at the top.
QUESTIONER: What is here?
ANSWER: Jeans skirt is here.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: cherry
RIGHT: hedgehog
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: toner
NORTHWEST: melons
NORTHEAST: highlighter
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: glue
HERE: jeans skirt
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: shirt
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: foundation
OUTSIDE: shampoo

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: Foundation is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Blush is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Highlighter is in the northeast.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: The hedgehog is on my right.
QUESTIONER: What is there?
ANSWER: Cleanser is there.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: Melons are in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?
ANSWER: The eagle is everywhere.
QUESTIONER: What is nowhere?
ANSWER: The shirt is nowhere.
QUESTIONER: What is at the center?
ANSWER: Toner is at the center.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southeast?
ANSWER: Glue is in the southeast.
QUESTIONER: What is on your left?
ANSWER: Cherry is on the left.
QUESTIONER: What is at the top?
ANSWER: Pens are at the top.
QUESTIONER: What is here?
ANSWER: Jeans skirt is here.
QUESTIONER: What is at the bottom?
ANSWER: Elephant is at the bottom.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is in the northwest? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
